_comment: HOW THIS WORKS: 'latest' is the version AVAILABLE to users. The running build is CURRENT_VERSION inside wealthflow-update-system.js. To announce an update: publish new app files AND set 'latest' here to the new number. Users on an older version see the 'Update available' banner. 'type' = full | minor | security. List a version in 'mandatory' to force it.
notes: Income & Investments split into two tabs · professional icon system (emojis removed) · Gift & Gold categories · statement imports auto-mark past payments paid/received · mandatory bank charges (ATM/CEFT) filed once — never duplicated, never skipped · offline-boot persistence fix for subscriptions & sessions (multi-device consistency)
